rules.rule_text:
rule dendroid
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		authoer_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-08-18"
		description = "Identify Dendroid Rat"

	strings:
		$s1 = "/upload-pictures.php?"
		$s2 = "Opened Dialog:"
		$s3 = "com/connect/MyService"
		$s4 = "android/os/Binder"
		$s5 = "android/app/Service"

	condition:
		all of them
}
